WebLink.url: {!URLFOR($Site.BaseUrl + '/apex/dfsle__sending', null, [ sId = Contract.Id, DST = 'ef314017-4e2b-4368-bdf8-cd53d5eef0fe', CRL = 'Email~' + Contract.Clinician_Email__c + ';FirstName~' + Contract.Clinician_First_Name__c + ';LastName~' + Contract.Clinician_Last_Name__c + ';Role~Signer 1', LA = '0', SRS = '1', RES = '1,3,3,1,60,3', LF = '0', MRL = '1', STB = '1', SSB = '0', SES = '1', SEM = '1', SCS = '0'])}
